channel.title: Frontend on Reion's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Frontend on Reion's Blog

item.title: Redesigning My Blog, GOV.UK Style
item.description: I recently redesigned this blog. The visual direction came from GOV.UK Design System. I checked alphagov/govuk-frontend for implementation details, then asked codex-cli with gpt-5.4 to do most of the coding.
